news-global-econ.description:
A couple from Illinois recently tied the knot at an unlikely place that is known and loved by travelers all over the world.

news-global-econ.title: Israel Approves Record Defense Budget During Iran War
news-global-econ.description:
Israel’s parliament, the Knesset, approved a record $45.8 billion defense budget Monday as the war in Iran entered its second month.
The post Israel Approves Record Defense Budget During Iran War appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Key US ally blocks airspace to military flights over Iran, escalating standoff with Trump
news-global-econ.description: Spain denied U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace and bases for Iran conflict operations, with Defense Minister Robles calling the war "illegal."

news-global-econ.title: Powell Says Fed Inclined to Look Past Iran Oil Shock, Sees Inflation Expectations Well Anchored
news-global-econ.description:
Speaking to undergraduate economics students at Harvard University, Powell said the standard central-banking response to energy shocks is to wait them out rather than react with policy changes.

news-global-econ.title: Bessent says ‘more and more’ ships moving through Strait of Hormuz, could ease oil price pressure
news-global-econ.description: Scott Bessent suggests the U.S. will retake Strait of Hormuz control, promising freedom of navigation to help stabilize global oil supply and costs.

news-korea-soc.title: Iran's war against the US and Israel is being fueled by North Korean weapons, expert warns
news-korea-soc.description: Iran's ballistic missiles, including the Shahab-3 and Khorramshahr-4, were developed with North Korean help, says expert Bruce Bechtol, who urges stronger sanctions enforcement.

news-korea-soc.title: AI war in Iran has brought conflict to Silicon Valley. No one is ready
news-korea-soc.description: Iran published a 29-location target list naming Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Nvidia and Palantir, then struck AWS data centers in the UAE and Bahrain.

news-global-soc.description:
